name: progress_protocol
display_name: Progress Protocol
version: 1.0.0
author: Rolf Masfelder
description: How to protocol the progress of the project
---

# Skill Instructions

Document the progress of your project by inserting updates to a markdown file named `PROGRESS_PROTOCOL.md` in the docs directory of your project repository. New entries should be added at the top of the file, so that the most recent updates are always visible first. Each entry should include a date, a brief description of the progress made, and any relevant links or references to issues, pull requests, or documentation.

As a template, you can use the file `docs/PROGRESS_PROTOCOL_TEMPLATE.md` in this repository.

Should only be used for major milestones of your project (e.g., feature completions, architectural changes, major refactorings), not for every small change. Also use when explicitly requested by the project mentor.
